scope: External public launch and store submission readiness for mobile web, PWA, Capacitor iOS, Capacitor Android, API, cloud worker, privacy, and store operations.

sourceWarnings: Public domain is provided as https://www.zkraiflow.top and public pages returned HTTP 200 on 2026-06-09
Public domain smoke evidence on 2026-06-10 records npm run public:check with 30 passes, 0 blockers, and 2 owner-input warnings
PWA public asset smoke evidence on 2026-06-10 records npm run pwa:public-smoke with 31 passes, 0 blockers, and 0 warnings
Authenticated smoke evidence template is ready, but filled authenticated run evidence is still pending
Unauthenticated cloud smoke against https://www.zkraiflow.top passed 8 checks and 0 failures on 2026-06-09
PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN or CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS still needs production runtime verification
Authenticated cloud:smoke still needs a review-safe account against https://www.zkraiflow.top
blockers.releaseImpact: Users and reviewers now have a stable public HTTPS origin, but production auth/CORS and smoke-test evidence must still prove login, API requests, and task paths work from that origin.
unblockActions: Set PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN=https://www.zkraiflow.top in the production runtime.
Set CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://www.zkraiflow.top,capacitor://localhost,https://localhost.
Set SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top with a review-safe account.
Run npm run production:smoke-template and fill a redacted authenticated smoke evidence record.
Run authenticated cloud smoke and verify login, health, legal pages, and protected API behavior from the public origin.

sourceWarnings: Contact email still uses a TODO placeholder
Contact phone still uses a TODO placeholder
Review notes status is draft
blockers.releaseImpact: Store records and reviewer escalation paths cannot be completed without monitored support contact details.
unblockActions: Create or choose a monitored support inbox.
Choose support phone or business contact policy.
Update public/support.html and store/submission-readiness.json.
Fill review contact fields in store/review-notes-template.json.

sourceWarnings: Legal hub still contains pre-release wording
Privacy policy still contains pre-release wording
Terms of service still contains pre-release wording
AI disclosure still contains pre-release wording
Account deletion page still contains pre-release wording
Apple privacy nutrition label status is draft
Google Play Data safety status is draft
blockers.releaseImpact: Privacy pages and store privacy forms may not match production behavior until legal wording, retention periods, and provider disclosures are finalized.
unblockActions: Confirm operator identity and support contacts.
Confirm final AI/video providers, hosting, storage, logs, crash reporting, analytics, payment, and push notification services.
Confirm data retention and deletion policy.
Finalize public legal pages and privacy/data-safety form answers.
Update privacy statuses to ready after legal review.

sourceWarnings: Review demo account status is pending
Authenticated smoke evidence template is ready, but real review credential and smoke evidence are still pending
Review notes status is draft
blockers.releaseImpact: Apple and Google reviewers cannot access restricted functionality until a dedicated review account and seeded sample data are ready.
unblockActions: Create a dedicated review account in the review environment.
Store the real password in the release password manager, not in the repository.
Run npm run review:seed against the review environment.
Run npm run production:smoke-template and collect a redacted authenticated smoke result.
Run npm run cloud:smoke with the same account.
Paste credentials and instructions into App Store Connect / Play Console during submission.

sourceWarnings: CONSOLE_AUTH_COOKIE_SECURE is not enabled
PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN or CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS is not set for the current verification environment
Final origin is https://www.zkraiflow.top
deploy/production.env.example now passes npm run production:profile
blockers.releaseImpact: Authenticated mobile web/PWA/App sessions are not production-safe until origins and cookies are hardened.
unblockActions: Set NODE_ENV=production.
Set CONSOLE_AUTH_COOKIE_SECURE=true.
Choose SameSite=Lax for same-origin or SameSite=None plus Secure=true for cross-origin App/API.
Set PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN=https://www.zkraiflow.top.
Pin CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS to https://www.zkraiflow.top plus required Capacitor origins and disable wildcard/authenticated localhost origins for production.

sourceWarnings: Authenticated cloud smoke still needs a review-safe account against https://www.zkraiflow.top
Rollback command or platform action is not yet confirmed
Production log redaction and retention policy still need platform review
Week-one monitoring ownership is not yet assigned
blockers.releaseImpact: Public launch is risky without a verified health-check surface, authenticated smoke evidence, rollback playbooks, log safety rules, and first-week monitoring ownership.
unblockActions: Confirm hosting health check path and alert target.
Run authenticated npm run cloud:smoke against https://www.zkraiflow.top with a review-safe account.
Confirm rollback actions for previous build/container, environment variables, dry-run fallback, and worker concurrency.
Assign owners for week-one daily monitoring and support inbox review.
Review log redaction rules before sharing logs with reviewers or support channels.

sourceWarnings: RUN_STORAGE_DIR is not set in the local development .env
deploy/production.env.example declares a persistent server path and passes npm run production:profile
Persistent storage restart evidence template is ready, but filled production restart evidence is still pending
blockers.releaseImpact: Uploads, generated outputs, privacy requests, and review demo data may be lost on restart if storage remains ephemeral.
unblockActions: Choose mounted volume or object storage adapter.
Set RUN_STORAGE_DIR.
Run npm run storage:restart-template before collecting production restart evidence.
Verify uploads, generated files, data exports, and deletion requests survive restart.
Define backup and retention policy.

sourceWarnings: LIBTV_BRIDGE_URL points to localhost
LIBTV_REGISTER_SCRIPT is a Windows local path
LIBTV_DB_PATH is a Windows local path
deploy/production.env.example declares non-local worker/server paths and passes npm run production:profile
deploy/libtv-worker-api-contract.json defines the private worker API contract
libTV worker smoke evidence template is ready, but filled worker health, dry-run, idempotency, poll, cancel, failure mapping, result import, and restart evidence are still pending
blockers.releaseImpact: Real video generation cannot be public-ready while it depends on a local desktop service or Windows-only paths.
unblockActions: Choose worker topology: private worker service, co-located process, or queue worker.
Create LIBTV_WORKER_TOKEN in the hosting secret manager.
Package Python, ffmpeg, libTV runtime, and storage dependencies.
Replace localhost and Windows paths with cloud/private service values.
Run npm run cloud:worker-smoke-template before collecting redacted worker smoke evidence.
Validate health, submit, poll, cancel, failure, and result import.

sourceWarnings: ANDROID_HOME or ANDROID_SDK_ROOT is not set
JDK 8 is available, but Android Gradle plugin 8.x builds should use JDK 17 or newer
iOS build and signing validation must still run on macOS with Xcode
Native signing credentials and release archive evidence remain pending
blockers.releaseImpact: Native App Store / Google Play builds cannot be signed and validated from the current machine state.
unblockActions: Install Android SDK and set ANDROID_HOME or ANDROID_SDK_ROOT.
Use JDK 17 or newer for Android Gradle.
Prepare Android upload keystore outside the repository and enroll or confirm Google Play App Signing.
Prepare Apple Developer team, distribution certificate, App Store provisioning profile, and App Store Connect app record.
Run Android Studio Gradle build and device validation.
Run iOS build/signing validation on macOS with Xcode.

sourceWarnings: Store screenshot status is pending
Native store screenshots still wait for iOS/Android builds
blockers.releaseImpact: Store submission cannot use only web-first-pass screenshots; native device families still need store-accurate captures.
unblockActions: Use current web screenshots as layout baseline.
Capture iOS required device-family screenshots after iOS build validation.
Capture Google Play Android phone screenshots after Android build validation.
Confirm screenshots hide private data, local paths, secrets, and TODO URLs.

sourceWarnings: Mobile device QA plan still has blocked Android native validation
Mobile device QA plan still has blocked iOS native validation
Mobile QA evidence template is ready, but real tester result records are still pending
PWA device install evidence template is ready, but Android/iOS install evidence is still pending

blockers.releaseImpact: The current web-first-pass evidence is enough for internal iteration, but external users and store reviewers still need real-device proof for login, upload, install, safe areas, file picker, legal links, and native screenshot paths.
unblockActions: Run npm run mobile:qa and keep the plan current.
Run npm run mobile:qa:evidence before inviting testers and use store/mobile-device-qa-evidence-template.json for result capture.
Run npm run pwa:device-template and capture Android/iOS PWA install evidence before expanding the PWA pilot.
Complete Android real-device QA after Android SDK and JDK 17+ are configured.
Complete iOS real-device or store-accurate simulator QA on macOS/Xcode.
Record production PWA install, review login, upload/create, settings/legal, and store screenshot evidence.
Update store/mobile-device-qa-plan.json statuses from blocked/manual-ready to verified states after evidence is captured.

maintenanceRules: Every public-launch warning from product:report should map to at least one blocker item.
Every blocker must have owner, status, sourceWarnings, unblockActions, verificationCommands, and evidenceFiles.
Do not mark a blocker resolved until the listed verification commands pass against the intended environment.
Do not store real passwords, API keys, signing keys, or private customer data in this register.
